🔁 RE Drill — Repetitive Emulation

Wrong answers cycle back into the deck until mastered (2× consecutive correct).

How RE works:
  1. Pool of N questions chosen at random.
  2. Wrong answer → question goes to back of queue.
  3. Correct → question marked "1× correct".
  4. Two consecutive corrects → mastered, removed from pool.
  5. Drill complete when all questions mastered.

ℹ️ About RE™ — Repetitive Emulation

RE is the AAA Smart Security training doctrine: repeat until correct, emulate until automatic, standardize until universal.

The Three Pillars

  1. Repetition — exposure × frequency builds neural pathways.
  2. Emulation — mirror a verified standard. Don't reinvent.
  3. Standardization — every tech, every location, same playbook. 74 locations, one standard.

Why It Works

Field operations break when execution varies. RE eliminates variance by making the standard automatic. When a technician can answer correctly without thinking, they can execute correctly under stress.

How This Portal Applies RE

  • RE Drill mode cycles wrong answers until mastered.
  • Mastery = two consecutive correct answers.
  • Scenarios emulate field situations before the real call comes in.
  • Peer Connector ensures everyone gets the same verified answer.

Companion Frameworks

CCC: Canvas → Convert → Cultivate (sales). S·B·E: Sense → Bridge → Engage (member-facing empathy). ERS: Emergency Roadside Standard. CW: Continuous Walkthrough.
